Package javadraw

Class Color

java.lang.Object
javadraw.Color
public class Color extends Object
Represents a Color in the RGB format. Contains some presets with names.

  • Constructor Details

    • Color

      public Color(String name)
      Create a new Color based on a String name.
      Parameters:
      name - name of the Color

    • Color

      public Color(int r, int g, int b)
      Create a new Color from the given RGB values
      Parameters:
      r - Red value
      g - Green value
      b - Blue value

    • Color

      public Color(Color color)
      Duplicate a color
      Parameters:
      color - Color to duplicate

    • Color

      protected Color(Color color)
      Create a new Color from an AWT Color
      Parameters:
      color - AWT Color to create a color from

  • Method Details

    • red

      public int red()
      Get the red value of the Color
      Returns:
      an integer (0 - 255)

    • green

      public int green()
      Get the green value of the color
      Returns:
      an integer (0 - 255)

    • blue

      public int blue()
      Get the blue value of the Color
      Returns:
      an integer (0 - 255)

    • random

      public static Color random()
      Get a random Color (entirely random)
      Returns:
      a random Color (random red, green, and blue values)

    • toAWT

      protected Color toAWT()
      Get an AWT representation of this color
      Returns:
      An AWT color, with the same values as this color
